plan.reasoning: Play Venerate to gain 2 stars, putting us at 3 stars. This enables Guiding Star, which deals 12 damage to Corpse Slug 0 and draws the remaining 2 cards from our draw pile (Strike and Defend). Playing the drawn Strike deals 6 damage, exactly lethal on Corpse Slug 0 (14 HP total). Killing Corpse Slug 0 triggers Corpse Slug 1's Ravenous power, stunning it and canceling its attack, resulting in 0 damage taken.
